name: pin
description: PIN/OTP dot progress display showing filled and empty dots with default, error, and success variants.

props.name: length
props.description: Total number of dots representing the PIN length.

props.name: filled
props.description: Number of filled dots representing characters entered so far.

props.name: variant
props.description: Color variant applied to filled dots.

examples.label: Example 1
Example 2
examples.code:
// Success state after correct PIN entry
<Pin length={6} filled={6} variant="success" />

examples.label: Example 3
examples.code:
// Small dots in a compact layout
<Pin length={4} filled={enteredDigits} size="sm" gap="sm" />
